args.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

features = []
targets = []
import re

with open('alphasyn_gaspar2017_03um_seed_all/fit.tsv') as f:
    reader = csv.reader(f, delimiter='\t')
    header = next(reader)
    concentrations = []
    for name in header[1:]:
        m = re.search(r':\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)uM\s*$', name)
        concentrations.append(float(m.group(1)))
    
    for row in reader:
        if not row: continue
        t = float(row[0])
        for c, v in zip(concentrations, row[1:]):
            if v and v.strip().lower() != 'nan':
                features.append([t, c])
                targets.append(float(v))

X = np.array(features)
y = np.array(targets)
print('X shape:', X.shape)
print('y shape:', y.shape)
print('time range:', X[:,0].min(), X[:,0].max())
print('conc values:', sorted(set(X[:,1])))
print('y range:', y.min(), y.max())
print('y mean:', y.mean())
"
